formula: timing = base_number × observer_modifier, unit by event type

本生体.label: immediate (即成)
本生体.meaning: Favorable force present at surface → fast resolution

互生体.label: gradual (渐成)
互生体.meaning: Favorable force in nuclear layer → middling resolution

變生体.label: slow (稍迟)
變生体.meaning: Favorable force only in outcome → delayed resolution

base_number: 全卦之数 — total number from the casting arithmetic

unit_selection.note: Practitioner judgment. No algorithm for unit selection.

two_channel_note.xiantian: 先天: uses arc layer only (止以卦論，不甚用易之爻辭). Timing from 卦气 (trigram-associated stems/branches).
two_channel_note.houtian: 後天: uses arc + 爻辭 text layer. Timing from total number + observer state.
